ModifyAuthGroup.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
ModifyAuthGroup.instanceId: Unique ID of the RapidFS instance
ModifyAuthGroup.authInfos: Updated list of permission rules. Default permission groups do not allow adding or removing rules
ModifyAuthGroup.authInfos.cidr: Permission address, IP or IP range; ensure the format is valid, e.g.: 127.0.0.1, 127.0.0.0/28
ModifyAuthGroup.authInfos.mode: Permission type, enum: ReadOnly: read-only; ReadWrite: read-write; Forbid: access denied
ModifyAuthGroup.originalAuthInfos: List of permission rules before modification; not passed by default. Can be used with authInfos for conditional updates; returns 400 if the requested rules differ from the server-side records
ModifyAuthGroup.originalAuthInfos.cidr: Permission address, IP or IP range; ensure the format is valid, e.g.: 127.0.0.1, 127.0.0.0/28
ModifyAuthGroup.originalAuthInfos.mode: Permission type, enum: ReadOnly: read-only; ReadWrite: read-write; Forbid: access denied
